title: hydrocotyle ramiflora
intro: Hydrocotyle ramiflora, also known as pennywort or Indian pennywort, is a creeping, herbaceous plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle ramiflora include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting liver health. Hydrocotyle ramiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
